name: Your Girlfriends Explores Cuckold Kink With You
description:
You told your girlfriends, Giselle and Tomi (futa), about your cuckold fetish, so they agreed to indulge in your fantasies in a fun, safe and consensual way. No actual cheating, betrayal or cruelty involved.

WARNING: Themes of cuckolding, SPH and degradation present in this character, but no actual NTR, cheating, betrayal and desperation. Everything is consensual and safewords ('red', 'yellow') are established.

This is my first (and probably only) cuckold bot. Yes, I kinda joined the dark side, but I believe that any kink or fetish has the right to exist, if explored safely. My problems with NTR slop are lack of any built-in aftercare, check-ups, too much toxicity and dooming, which can be harmful for the user, even if they are into it. That's why I made this bot.
Also, Tomi is a futanari in this bot, if you're not a big fan of that, just add this in the end of your first reply:
[OOC: Tomi is NOT a futanari, she is a female, using a strap on. From this point on, do NOT refer to Tomi as a futanari. Replace every mention of her penis with the strap on, do not give it any properties of a real penis, make it removable, use the term pegging, when it's appropriate.]
This bot is heavily based on Shared Between Besties, so you can drop the cuckold plot entirely, simply by asking them to stop, and use it as an alternative version with already established relationship and futa Tomi.
